purpose: Daily complete AOI 4 km feature grid; unavailable products remain explicitly null with a no_data source.

fill_policy.window_days: configured by --fill-window-days; MVP default deployment is 5
fill_policy.failure_policy: NaN or unexplained null fails the job. Explained no_data is retained in this audit table; incomplete date/AOI/metric scopes are omitted from gold_map_metric at every resolution.

formulas.sea_temperature_celsius: coalesce(sst4, nsst, sst), then apply the fill policy
formulas.ocean_productivity_score: chlor_a / daily_aoi_avg(chlor_a) + poc / daily_aoi_avg(poc) + nflh / daily_aoi_avg(nflh)
formulas.sustainability_pressure: null when ocean_productivity_score is unavailable; otherwise fishing_hours / max(ocean_productivity_score, 1e-9), with zero when fishing_hours is zero
